active_resolution.validation_horizon: complete staged implementation, proof, and control-pack subject

sections: HCM-0.6 exact shipped kind and root-profile data
HCM-1.4 profile-aware setup and doctor decision proof gate
Selected implementation authority and clean planning review lineage

repo_truth: Fresh read-only implementation review of the exact canonical-LF 25-entry surviving-file manifest plus the staged deletion of crates/compiler/src/doctor_shell.rs and crates/compiler/src/setup_shell.rs. The complete staged diff has 27 paths. The subject implements only the reviewed HCM-1.4 profile-decision, inspection, setup, doctor, CLI, exact author-lock portability, authorized author-test helper, proof, and narrow control-pack boundary. Full Unix workspace clippy/tests/package proof and actual Windows MSVC named runtime tests are recorded in the proof wall. Independently derive a verdict; inherit no approval.
allowed_scope: Remain read-only and replay the sorted 25-entry canonical-LF manifest and aggregate fingerprint; separately verify exactly the two named obsolete shell files are deleted and the complete staged name-status set is 27 paths.
Read and review every changed production, test, proof, and control-pack byte against the HCM-1.4 SPEC/plan/todo and unchanged authority refs.
Run bounded read-only Rust, Git, manifest, API, security, determinism, mutation-order, portability, package, scope, and validator checks as needed.
Return findings first with exact file/line evidence and smallest in-scope remediation through the built-in channel.
non_goals: No edits, staging, commits, new dispatches, handoffs, ledger writes, or user task hops.
No condition evidence/evaluator, canonical content authority/materialization, semantic validation, intake, renderer/Projection, SDK, publication, flow/pipeline, HCM-2+, or adjacent cleanup.
Do not infer compatibility bridges, profile flags, generated commands, transactional reset repair, broader authoring changes, or a compiler package claim.
Do not treat the parent proof wall or the planning Review 11 CLEAN result as implementation approval.
tasks: Invoke the required skills in order, remain read-only, replay the exact manifest/aggregate and two deletions, and return BLOCKED if any subject byte differs.
Review findings first in Critical, Required, Optional, Nit order with severity, exact file/line, violated gate, concrete failure, smallest remediation, and invalidated proof.
Audit decision types/accessors, condition binding and evidence-surface absence, stable order, custom profile/kind/instance support, and no fixed universe or ambient discovery.

Audit repository inspection for bounded strict no-follow reads, aggregate accounting, duplicate-safe YAML, exact status/reason mapping, instance-routed structural validation, deterministic complete rows, and bounded disclosure.

Audit setup/doctor direct adoption, exact public contracts/errors/status precedence, no selected-artifact write, rewrite and mutation ordering, injected/default equality, and honest reset failure semantics.
Audit CLI-only wording/JSON/exit ownership, exact snake-case values and one trailing LF, preserved grammar/root discovery, and no new profile/condition input.
Audit the exact author portability hunk and two test fixture helpers; verify helper bodies/unlock semantics and substantive 47/22 assertions stay within the frozen exception.

Verify the focused/full Unix, actual Windows runtime, 29-member package, extracted crate, compiler source-tree, Cargo equality, fixed-symbol/input-absence, scope, secret, whitespace, handoff, and GitNexus proof claims are reproducible and sufficient.

Verify the four control-pack updates and proof wall promote only BoundaryLanded setup/doctor evidence while all condition/content/materialization/semantic/intake/renderer/Projection/publication/downstream/HCM-2 gates remain open.
Return CLEAN only if there is no valid Critical or Required finding; otherwise return CHANGES_REQUIRED or BLOCKED.
stop_conditions: Return BLOCKED if the subject fingerprint, two deletions, authority, or mandatory read-only verification cannot be reproduced.
Return CHANGES_REQUIRED rather than inventing evidence authority, API fields, compatibility, content authority, platform proof, publication, or later-slice behavior.
Return to the parent if remediation would require scope outside the exact HCM-1.4 allowlist or HCM-2+ work.
